title: Credential Stuffing Attack
description: Attackers utilize lists of compromised usernames and passwords (credential stuffing) to attempt login to the system. This leverages existing data breaches to gain unauthorized access.
attack_vector: Brute-force or dictionary attacks against username/password combinations obtained from external breaches.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) to significantly reduce the impact of compromised credentials.
Rate limiting login attempts to mitigate brute-force attacks.
Regularly monitor for unusual login activity and investigate suspicious accounts.
